calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
Petitioner: Julie Liming Chow, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Johnnie Cheung aka Johnnie Chow, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Nelson Mok.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
The request to Dispense with notice as to Job Cheung, the biological father of the minor, is granted in open court.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Johnnie Chow.
Decree signed in open court.
